programs.name: Anthropic AI for Science
programs.notes: First Monday monthly review. Bio/life sciences focus. Top pick #1 if academic affiliation.

programs.name: Anthropic Economic Futures
programs.notes: Quarterly cycles; next ~June 2026. Empirical economics framing required.

programs.name: Anthropic External Researcher Access
programs.notes: Most realistic Anthropic path for solo dev w/ alignment angle.

programs.name: Anthropic Startup Program
programs.notes: VC referral effectively required for top tiers.

programs.name: OpenAI for Startups (Tier 2/3)
programs.notes: Cold apps land sparse $1K. EV-per-effort poor.

programs.name: OpenAI Grove
programs.notes: Cohort 2 closed Jan 12 2026. No Cohort 3 dates.

programs.name: Google Gemini for Research
programs.notes: Monthly review. Top pick #2 if academic tie.

programs.name: Google AI Studio Free Tier
programs.notes: Limits cut 50–80% Dec 2025; Pro paywalled Apr 1 2026.

programs.name: Google for Startups Cloud (AI Tier)
programs.notes: Requires qualifying VC funding seed–Series A.

programs.name: xAI Grok Credits / Data Sharing
programs.notes: Free $150/mo if non-sensitive. No formal startup program.

programs.name: Cohere Startup Program
programs.notes: Discount only — not pure credits. Skip for token-grant goals.

programs.name: Mistral Mistralship
programs.notes: No-VC required EU credit program. Cohort-based.

programs.name: Meta Llama Startup Program
programs.notes: Best non-equity Llama credits. US-only filter.

programs.name: Meta Llama Impact Grants
programs.notes: AI Glasses track closed Mar 9 2026. Annual cycle.

programs.name: Together AI Research Credits
programs.notes: Lowest-friction open-model credits. Stack with $25 signup.

programs.name: Together AI Startup Accelerator
programs.notes: Best non-equity credits for fine-tuning open models. Top pick #4.

programs.name: Fireworks for Startups
programs.notes: Best if stack already on Fireworks.

programs.name: Groq for Startups
programs.notes: Pitch agentic workloads needing many sequential calls.

programs.name: Cerebras Free Tier
programs.notes: Most generous always-on free tier. Top pick #5 — passive.

programs.name: Perplexity Sonar Startup
programs.notes: Only if grounded web search needed.

programs.name: AI21 Labs (Jamba) Free Trial
programs.notes: Trivial size. No formal research program found.

programs.name: Replicate (via AI Grant)
programs.notes: No standalone OSS program. Pursue AI Grant directly.

programs.name: Hugging Face Pro / Compute Grants
programs.notes: Best path for shipping public AI demo as Space.

programs.name: Modal Academics / Startup
programs.notes: Best general-purpose serverless GPU credits. One-time per tier.

programs.name: AI Grant (Friedman/Gross)
programs.notes: Annual batches. Friedman+Gross at Meta — future uncertain.

programs.name: Microsoft for Startups Founders Hub
programs.notes: Backdoor to GPT-4o/o-series via Azure OpenAI. 12-mo expiry.

programs.name: Block Goose Grant
programs.notes: Rolling, open (re-verified Jul 2026). Goose moved to Linux Foundation Agentic AI Foundation Apr 2026 — apply via goose-docs.ai/grants Google Form (old block.github.io URL is dead). Focus: MCP integrations, security audits, agent autonomy, multi-modal, real-world automation. Milestone-based quarterly payouts; work must not be employer/client-funded. Launched Jul 2025 (no fresh 2026 round — continuous).

programs.name: AI Grant (Friedman/Gross) Batch 4
programs.notes: Batch 4 closed; B5 TBA. Founders both at Meta — uncertain.

programs.name: Cloudflare Startup Program
programs.notes: Credits not cash; only useful if hitting real bills.

programs.name: Mozilla Builders Accelerator
programs.notes: Cohort 1 closed; watch for Cohort 2. Local-AI focus.

programs.name: Daytona Startup Credits
programs.notes: Useful for sandboxed code execution use cases.

programs.name: OpenAI Codex OSS Fund
programs.notes: Rolling. Bonus: ≥1K star repos get free ChatGPT Pro.

programs.name: Modal Startup Credits
programs.notes: Pair with Codex Fund for compute + inference coverage.

programs.name: Anthropic Claude for OSS
programs.notes: Closes Jun 30 2026. No-brainer if you maintain anything popular.

programs.name: Astral OSS Fund
programs.notes: Acquired by OpenAI Mar 2026; continuity unclear.

programs.name: Hugging Face GPU Grants
programs.notes: Apply via Space discussion thread. Trivial if you have a Space.

programs.name: E2B Hobby Credits
programs.notes: Trivial signup. First steps for sandbox infra.

programs.name: Sovereign Tech Fund (DE)
programs.notes: Tens to hundreds of K EUR per engagement.

programs.name: LFAI & Data sandbox/incubation
programs.notes: Strategic if building cross-org infra. Not direct funding.

programs.name: Vercel AI Accelerator
programs.notes: Startup track not pure OSS. Skip if OSS-focused.

programs.name: HF Fellowship Program
programs.notes: Nomination-only by HF team or existing Fellows.

programs.name: AWS Activate Portfolio
programs.notes: Need accelerator/VC Org ID. NVIDIA Inception members qualify.

programs.name: Microsoft for Startups (Enhanced)
programs.notes: Stripe Atlas / Brex / Mercury can unlock.

programs.name: Google for Startups Cloud (AI Tier)
programs.notes: $10K Model Garden = cleanest cross-lab credit stack.

programs.name: Oracle for Startups
programs.notes: 70% discount on paid usage. Niche AI integrations.

programs.name: Hetzner
programs.notes: Cheap baseline VPS. Not for AI workloads.

programs.name: Replicate Startup
programs.notes: Best as supplement; Replicate margin baked in.

programs.name: Together AI Startup Accelerator
programs.notes: Locked to OSS models — no Claude/GPT.

programs.name: NVIDIA Inception
programs.notes: $100K DGX Cloud is selective. Path to AWS Activate Portfolio.

programs.name: Cerebras Free Tier
programs.notes: Best free tier in 2026. 8K context cap.

programs.name: Anthropic External Researcher
programs.notes: Independent solo OK with alignment framing.

programs.name: Brex/Mercury/Ramp/Stripe Atlas perks
programs.notes: Best path for solo dev to unlock multi-cloud without VC.

programs.name: Anthropic Fellows Program
programs.entity: Strong Python coders no PhD req
programs.notes: 4-month full-time. >40% convert FT. May & July 2026 cohorts.

programs.name: Conviction Embed
programs.notes: Best terms among AI-native programs. Sarah Guo's Conviction.

programs.name: Neo Residency
programs.notes: Best dilution profile. Optional $40K student grant.

programs.name: AI Grant (Batch 4)
programs.notes: Batch 4 closed. Founders at Meta — uncertain.

programs.name: Open Philanthropy Tech AI Safety RFP
Founders Inc. AI Hardware Residency
programs.notes: 3rd cohort kicked off Apr 1 2026. SF in-person.

programs.name: ARIA (UK) Scaling Trust / Safeguarded AI
programs.notes: Scaling Trust closed Apr 14 2026. PD cohort 3 opens Aug 2026.

programs.name: Survival & Flourishing Fund
programs.notes: 2026 main-round Apr 22 closed. Watch for next round.

programs.name: Pioneer.app
programs.notes: Status uncertain after Daniel Gross moved to Meta.

programs.name: Stripe Atlas
programs.notes: Infrastructure not funding. Every solo founder should use.

programs.name: OpenAI Superalignment Fast Grants
programs.notes: Mission Alignment disbanded Feb 2026. Safety Fellowship Sep 2026 - Feb 2027.

programs.name: Tinygrad / tiny corp / comma.ai
programs.notes: No formal fellowship. Bounties via GitHub.

programs.name: NSF SBIR/STTR Phase I (AI)
programs.notes: Relaunched Jun 2 2026 after ~5mo freeze under solicitation 26-510: $210M pool (+ separate $40M instrumentation pilot 26-511). "Strategic Breakthrough" is up to $30M per company, invite-only for existing Phase II awardees — not open to new applicants. Project Pitch open now; full proposal deadline Jul 27 2026 (then Nov 4 2026, Mar 4 2027). $305K cap dates to NSF 24-579 (2024), not new. 20 hr/wk PI requirement is real blocker.

programs.name: NSF POSE
programs.notes: Solo dev not directly eligible. Partner w/ uni.

programs.name: DARPA AIE
programs.notes: Small co with strong tech credentials can win.

programs.name: ARPA-H ADVOCATE
programs.notes: Solution Summary Feb 27 2026 passed; watch re-issue.

programs.name: Schmidt AI Institute Fellow in Residence
EIC Accelerator
programs.notes: Step 2 deadlines: Jan 7 / Mar 4 / May 6 / Jul 8 / Sep 2 / Nov 4 2026. ~5% accept.

programs.name: Israel Innovation Authority Tnufa
programs.notes: Innovation Visa = 24mo residency. Designed for foreign solo.

programs.name: Open Philanthropy Technical AI Safety RFP
programs.notes: 300-word EOI. Last cycle closed Apr 15 2025; watch reissue.

programs.name: Long-Term Future Fund (LTFF)
programs.notes: Best AI-safety fund for unaffiliated solo. 1-3mo decisions.

programs.name: Manifund Regranting
programs.notes: Days to decision. AI safety preference.

programs.name: Foresight Institute AI Safety/Science Nodes
programs.notes: Last day of every month deadline.

programs.name: Optimism RetroPGF / Retro Funding
programs.notes: Sign-up windows in waves. Token risk HIGH.

programs.name: Optimism Foundation Missions
programs.notes: RFG-4 = AI smart contract audits. KYC threshold ~$10K.

programs.name: CDP AI Builder Program (Coinbase)
programs.notes: Stable USDC. Lowest-friction LLM agent + wallet.

programs.name: Polygon Community Grants S2
programs.notes: Eliza Labs allocator track for AI agents.

programs.name: Filecoin Dev Grants
programs.notes: 3-mo review cycle. AI agent storage primitives.

programs.name: Gitcoin Grants (GG24/GG25)
programs.notes: No smart contract required. Passport Sybil resistance.

programs.name: Bittensor Subnet Bounties
programs.notes: High technical bar. ML + subnet ops.

programs.name: Story Protocol Ecosystem
programs.notes: Confidential Data Rails Apr 2026 = AI training-data provenance.

programs.name: ASI Alliance Deep Funding
programs.notes: Larger AI-pure pool. KYC at payout.

programs.name: Lit Protocol Grants
programs.notes: JS SDK = AI dev friendly. No Solidity req.

programs.name: Founderpath
programs.notes: Best mainstream RBF for solo builders.

programs.name: Pipe
programs.notes: Pivoted to embedded SMB lending. Skip unless via partner.

programs.name: Wayflyer
programs.notes: Weak fit for AI dev tools.

programs.name: Stripe Capital
programs.notes: Excellent if revenue on Stripe. Same/next day.

programs.name: Mercury Venture Debt
programs.notes: 8-12% APR + warrants. Need prior VC raise.

programs.name: Calm Company Fund (was Earnest)
programs.notes: 2-5x cap. No PG. Best for solo bootstrapper.

programs.name: Replicate
programs.notes: 30-60 day net. Cold-start kills long tail.

programs.name: Modal
programs.notes: You own pricing infra cost is yours.

programs.name: Konwinski Prize
programs.notes: 90% GH issue resolver bar — very hard.

programs.name: Anthropic AI Safety Bounty
programs.notes: Public security bounty on HackerOne since May 7-8 2026 — open to anyone, ceiling ~$10-15K (Claude Code, API, claude.ai). The $35K Model Safety track (novel universal jailbreaks, CBRN/cyber) remains invite-only via application form. Two distinct programs — do not conflate.

programs.name: OpenAI GPT-5.5 Bio Bounty
programs.notes: Apr 28 - Jul 27 2026 window. Only 1st earns full.
